mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS requestId, r.from_user_id AS fromUserId, r.to_user_id AS toUserId, r.apply_msg AS applyMsg, r.status AS status, CASE WHEN r.to_user_id = #{userId} THEN 'INBOUND' ELSE 'OUTBOUND' END AS direction, r.created_at AS createdAt, actor.user_no AS userNo, actor.nickname AS nickname, actor.avatar_url AS avatarUrl FROM im_friend_request r JOIN im_user actor ON actor.id = CASE WHEN r.to_user_id = #{userId} THEN r.from_user_id ELSE r.to_user_id END WHERE (r.from_user_id = #{userId} OR r.to_user_id = #{userId}) AND r.status = 0 ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC
